questions.subject: Economy
questions.prompt: According to the current regulatory framework for Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) in India, a company intending to undertake CSR activities must mandatorily register with which of the following authorities?

options.text: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)

questions.explanation: It is a mandatory requirement for any company that intends to undertake CSR activities to register themselves with the Registrar of Companies (RoC). This ensures formal tracking and compliance of corporate social spending under the Companies Act.
questions.takeaway: CSR compliance requires formal registration with the Registrar of Companies (RoC).
questions.evidenceExcerpt: It is mandatory for a company intending to undertake a CSR activity to register themselves with the Registrar of Companies.

questions.subject: Economy
questions.prompt: The 'We Rise' (Women Entrepreneurs Reimagining Inclusive and Sustainable Enterprises) initiative is a strategic partnership aimed at scaling women-led MSMEs. Which of the following entities are the primary drivers of this initiative?

options.text: Ministry of MSME and the World Bank
NITI Aayog’s Women Entrepreneurship Platform and DP World
FICCI and the International Monetary Fund

questions.explanation: The 'We Rise' initiative was launched by NITI Aayog’s Women Entrepreneurship Platform (WEP) under its 'Award to Reward' (ATR) initiative in collaboration with DP World. Its objective is to help women entrepreneurs and women-led MSMEs scale globally through trade facilitation and mentorship.
questions.takeaway: The 'We Rise' initiative is a public-private collaboration involving NITI Aayog and DP World focused on global trade for women-led MSMEs.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Launched by: NITI Aayog’s Women Entrepreneurship Platform (WEP) under its Award to Reward (ATR) initiative along with DP World. Objective: To help women entrepreneurs, including women-led MSMEs, to scale their businesses globally through trade facilitation, mentorship, and strategic partnerships.
